aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

children.description: ReactNode to render as this component's content

headingElement.description: The HTML tag used for the title

step.description: The number of the step in the list of steps

status.description: May replace the number provided in props.step with alternate styling.

titleSize.description:
Title sizing equivalent to **EuiTitle**, but only `m`, `s`, `xs` font sizes.
The `xxs` size reduces the size of the accompanying step indicator, but not the title itself.
